overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city at night, featuring massive neon-lit skyscrapers, elevated highways, and a waterfront promenade. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing the game's detailed urban environment with wet streets reflecting vibrant neon advertisements.

events.description: turning left onto the main avenue toward the mega building
passing the parked black sedan on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking down a wet city street toward a massive neon-lit building complex, navigating around a parked vehicle

entered.detail: massive multi-story building covered in vertical neon strips and holographic advertisements
black sedan parked in the middle of the road
elevated highway structure with red neon lighting underneath
tall palm tree silhouetted against the neon building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet city street at night, dominated by a massive neon-lit mega building in the distance. The camera moves forward past a parked black sedan and turns left onto a main avenue, with an elevated monorail track visible to the right.

events.description: green sports car drives past on the right side of the avenue

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the avenue beneath the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving past on the avenue

entered.detail: dark building facade with illuminated windows lining the avenue

segments.scene_description: Walking along an avenue beneath an elevated highway structure with red neon underlighting. The mega building remains visible to the left while a green sports car passes by on the right. The street is lined with dark building facades featuring illuminated windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront access stairs and retaining wall

events.description: transitioning from street level to waterfront promenade area
descending concrete stairs toward the water level

agents.ego_description: approaching the waterfront and descending concrete stairs to the lower promenade level

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing near the bottom of the stairs

entered.detail: tall concrete wall separating the street from the waterfront
wide concrete staircase leading down to the water level
dark water canal reflecting the neon lights from the buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a waterfront area with a concrete retaining wall on the right. The camera approaches and descends a wide staircase toward the water level, where the canal reflects the vibrant neon lights of the distant mega building.

events.description: entering the covered waterfront walkway with water reflections visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade with the neon cityscape reflected in the water

entered.detail: concrete pedestrian walkway along the water's edge
tall cylindrical tower with red neon rings and digital displays

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered waterfront promenade with the canal on the left reflecting the neon lights. The mega building remains visible across the water while the elevated monorail track runs overhead. The walkway continues beneath the highway structure with various neon signs visible on distant buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district that transitions from a dense urban avenue to a reflective waterfront promenade. It begins on a wet city street, gliding past a parked black sedan before turning left onto a main avenue dominated by a massive neon-lit mega building and an elevated monorail track. As the camera moves further, the environment shifts beneath the red neon underlighting of an elevated highway, passing a green sports car and dark building facades. The scene then opens up toward the water, descending a wide staircase to a lower level where the canal begins to mirror the vibrant city lights. Finally, the movement continues along a covered promenade with the canal on the left and the monorail overhead, keeping the distant mega building in view while passing under the highway structure.
